summary: Frontend-only verification of Billing page in-app subscription management (cancel/reactivate). All 6 acceptance criteria from review_request passed. No code changes made.

test_results.login_admin_team_plan: PASS - admin@tiletakeoff.com logged in, redirected to /dashboard
test_results.billing_page_initial_state: PASS - /billing loads, current-plan='team', manage-subscription shows 'Active · renews Jul 19, 2026' with Cancel button
test_results.cancel_flow: PASS - clicking cancel-sub-btn (with window.confirm auto-accepted) switched card to 'Cancels on Jul 19, 2026' with reactivate-btn visible and cancel-sub-btn hidden. Toast: 'Subscription will cancel at period end'
test_results.reactivate_flow: PASS - clicking reactivate-btn returned card to 'Active · renews Jul 19, 2026' with cancel-sub-btn back and reactivate-btn hidden. Toast: 'Subscription reactivated'
test_results.plan_cards: PASS - plan-free, plan-pro, plan-team all render with feature checklists; plan-team shows 'Current plan'
test_results.compile_error_overlay: PASS - no webpack/compile error overlay detected
test_results.final_state: Workspace left in Active/reactivated state as instructed

critical_code_review_comments: Billing.js uses window.confirm() for destructive cancel action - works fine but a custom AlertDialog (already used elsewhere via shadcn) would be more on-brand. Non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing cancel/reactivate UI is fully verified working with proper state transitions, toasts, and button swapping. Admin workspace currently on team plan, active (not cancelled). cancel_at_period_end=false at end of run.
